_meta.description: Elvis-style agent swarm task registry with materialized TODOs

investigate-missing-silk.description: URGENT: Investigate why Silk session disappeared
investigate-missing-silk.objective: Forensic analysis of missing agent sessions
success_criteria: ✅ Determined agent sessions completed successfully
✅ Found mobile UX work delivered
✅ Identified OpenClaw cleanup behavior
✅ Documented normal session lifecycle
✅ Added cost tracking to activities API
✅ Updated OpenClaw bridge integration
✅ Verified dashboard shows real costs
✅ Fixed Task Registry data synchronization

fix-spawn-mechanism.description: URGENT: Fix agent spawn reliability issues
success_criteria: ✅ Identified normal OpenClaw agent lifecycle
✅ Fixed Task Registry data synchronization issues
✅ Implemented better status tracking
✅ No actual spawn reliability issues found

feat-mission-control-adapter.description: Adapt Mission Control UI to display Elvis-style agent swarm data
feat-mission-control-adapter.objective: Transform Mission Control from Firebase theater to real agent swarm monitoring
deliverables: ✅ All UI pages adapted (Dashboard, Board, Team, Activity)
success_criteria: ✅ Task Board displays git worktree tasks from active-tasks.json
✅ Activity Feed shows real agent progress (not Firebase theater)
✅ Dashboard shows live task registry summary
✅ Agent Status displays which agents working in which branches
✅ UI updates in real-time from task registry

feat-legacy-cleanup.description: Clean up legacy Mission Control theater code
feat-legacy-cleanup.objective: Remove old Firebase theater code and unused Mission Control components
success_criteria: Remove unused Firebase collections (fake tasks, activities)
Clean up unused API routes and components
Remove seed data and mock activity generators
Keep only what Durnik's adapter will use
Update dependencies and remove unused packages

mobile-ux-strategy.description: Design cutting-edge mobile UX for agent swarm monitoring
mobile-ux-strategy.objective: Mobile-first UX for agent monitoring on phone
success_criteria: ✅ Mobile UX delivered by Barak (mobile-ux-completion task)
✅ 5 user stories and 30 trackable tasks created
✅ Dashboard, Task Board, Agent Controls, Activity Feed, Settings components
✅ Mobile-first responsive design implemented

metrics-observability-strategy.description: Design comprehensive metrics framework for agent swarm observability
metrics-observability-strategy.objective: Complete observability strategy for agent performance and business impact
success_criteria: Cost tracking metrics (partially implemented)
Agent performance monitoring (architecture designed)
Business impact measurement framework (pending)
Real-time alerting system (pending)

health-check-component.description: Create Health Check Component - Display real-time agent success rates, cost tracking, system status, and warning indicators
health-check-component.objective: Build UI component for real-time system health monitoring

agent-performance-metrics.description: Agent Performance Monitoring Framework - Comprehensive metrics collection for agent execution time, success rates, and resource usage

troubleshooting-actions.description: Troubleshooting Quick Actions - Quick actions for killing stuck agents, running diagnostics, and viewing logs
troubleshooting-actions.objective: Build diagnostic and maintenance UI tools

cost-tracking-accuracy.description: Cost Tracking Accuracy Monitoring - Automated verification that cost tracking shows real costs, not $0.00
cost-tracking-accuracy.objective: Ensure cost tracking accuracy with automated validation

system-health-alerts.description: System Health Alerting System - Real-time alerts for agent failures, system issues, and performance degradation

task-lifecycle-monitoring.description: Task Lifecycle Monitoring - Track task progression from TODO → IN FLIGHT → DONE with timing and bottleneck analysis
task-lifecycle-monitoring.objective: Analyze and optimize task workflow performance

git-worktree-health.description: Git Worktree Health Monitoring - Monitor git worktree status, disk usage, and cleanup stale branches
git-worktree-health.objective: Maintain git infrastructure health and cleanliness

business-impact-metrics.description: Business Impact Measurement Framework - Measure business value delivered by agent tasks and ROI calculations
business-impact-metrics.objective: Quantify business value and ROI of agent work

monitoring-dashboard.description: Comprehensive Monitoring Dashboard - Single-pane-of-glass monitoring dashboard aggregating all health, performance, and business metrics

cost-optimization-hardening.description: Hard-lock codex defaults, verify no implicit API model use, add daily cost drift checks
cost-optimization-hardening.objective: Default-free/explicit-paid policy with automated drift detection
acceptance_criteria: Cost drift check reports non-codex usage

health-monitoring-rollout.description: Implement remaining health monitoring tasks and surface bottlenecks/alerts
health-monitoring-rollout.objective: Move health stack from planned to operational

discord-channel-publishing-fix.description: Route agent updates to configured Discord channels by stream and confirm delivery
discord-channel-publishing-fix.objective: Reliable publishing to each configured Discord channel
acceptance_criteria: Routing map defined for channel categories
